issues.description: Unexpected second effect with Trigger and DrawCard. Official text contains only Counter effect for power boost. The Draw action has no basis in card text.
Target should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter' (Leader and Character are both characters). 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is redundant/non-standard.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle.
